description: Zoro Nags MCP server for email/WhatsApp reminders, scheduling, and profile timezone management.

authentication.instructions: Provide users.verification_token via x-nag-mcp-token header or Authorization: Bearer <token>. Use nag_auth_email to send a sign-in magic link.

tools.name: nag_email_check
tools.description: Check whether an email is already registered before sending auth links.

tools.name: nag_request_link
tools.description: Create account if needed and send a magic-link email (requires confirm_send=true).

tools.name: nag_auth_email
tools.description: Email-first sign-in/signup helper that sends a magic link (requires confirm_send=true).

tools.name: nag_parse
tools.description: Parse natural language into a schedule draft.

tools.name: nags_sent_log
tools.description: List recent sent reminder emails from user memory log.

tools.name: nag_profile_set_timezone
tools.description: Set user timezone for future scheduling.

resources.name: nag_api_reference
resources.description: HTTP API behavior, payloads, and error semantics.

prompts.name: nag_onboard_user
prompts.description: Onboard a user by checking email registration and sending a magic link.

prompts.name: nag_create_from_text
prompts.description: Turn a plain-English reminder request into a draft, then create the nag.

prompts.name: nag_triage_overdue
prompts.description: Review active nags, identify overdue or noisy items, and suggest updates.
